license: Free to use, attribution appreciated. Linking back to vouchley.getrevlio.com is encouraged but not required.
description: A curated database of well-known disposable, temporary, and throwaway email providers plus a full raw list of 5,000+ disposable domains. Maintained by Vouchley.

api.description: For programmatic, always-current disposable detection plus IP, VPN, domain age, and behavioral signals, call the Vouchley API.

curated.description: Public-inbox throwaway service — anyone can read mail at any address.
Temporary inbox that self-destructs after 10 minutes.
German-origin disposable email with paid forwarding.
Alias-based forwarding with explicit message limits.
Privacy-focused email aliasing — risk-tier rather than hard-block.
Email aliasing acquired by Proton — risk-tier rather than hard-block.
Google webmail. NOT disposable — score normally, watch for + and dot alias abuse.
